title: Robin Hood of Monterey
writer: Bennett Cohen, O. Henry, Gilbert Roland
actors: Gilbert Roland, Chris-Pin Martin, Evelyn Brent
plot: Eduardo Belmonte overhears his new step-mother, Maria, and her lover, Don Ricardo Gonzales plotting to take over the Belmonte rancho on the night of the fiesta given by her husband, Don Carlos Belmonte. Eduardo offers Maria money ...
